usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 14 lifecycle steps passed with zero failures. COALESCE partial updates work correctly in both directions (title-only and description-only). Status transitions (PLANNING -> ACTIVE -> COMPLETED) preserve all fields. Share token lifecycle (enable, verify public view, disable, verify revocation) works correctly. Cascade deletion removes trip, bookings, and itinerary items. Booking ingestion parsed the Delta flight confirmation with accurate field extraction. The AI created well-described itinerary items when asked. This is a structurally clean backend with no data integrity issues detected.
